hooks.command: file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.html$'; then "/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome" --headless=new --screenshot="$(dirname "$file")/screenshot.png" --window-size=1440,900 --virtual-time-budget=2000 "file://$file" 2>/dev/null; fi
